User.title: User Profile
User.description: Stores consolidated astro-numerology profile, anti-fraud parameters, current chart pointer, and premium subscription metrics.

isSubscribed.description: True if profile has active paid subscription

trialUsed.description: True if this profile has active or past trial period

isPremium.description: True if profile has unlocked premium celestial maps

hasCreatedMap.description: True if initial birth details sintonized correctly

scorePoints.description: Collected stellar points from practices and daily activities

currentChartId.description: Document ID of the active natal chart in use

NatalChart.title: Astrological Natal Chart
NatalChart.description: Stores user birth parameters, calculated planets, houses, aspects, and customized AI readings.

isUnknownTime.description: True if birth time was computed as unknown/estimated

numerology.description: Derived Numerology cycle data at creation

Transit.title: Astrological Transits
Transit.description: Caches calculated transit alignments and forecasts for the user.

monthsData.description: Transit planets positions and interpretations map

DailyInsight.title: Daily Osiris Insights
DailyInsight.description: Osiris AI daily dashboard parameters, weather context, and energetic index.

insightData.description: Osiris system dashboard, radar, and recommendations dump

WeeklyInsight.title: Weekly Energetic Forecast
WeeklyInsight.description: Stores user calculated weekly astrological transits and guidance.

weeklyData.description: Poetic transit aspects and weekly guides

DeviceTrial.title: Device Trial Track
DeviceTrial.description: Fingerprint and unique ID registry to enforce the single-trial restriction.

deviceId.description: Durable hardware or browser random ID identifier

deviceFingerprint.description: Client calculated web browser fingerprint hash

trialUsed.description: True if device is mapped to active account trial

deviceInfo.description: Operating system and basic client capabilities dump

DreamLog.title: Celestial Dream Interpretation
DreamLog.description: Holds the history of dreams interpreted for an active user profile.

userId.description: Subscribed user UID or email reference

interpretation.description: Elias angelical and cosmic reading details

AstralExtraMap.title: Extra Astrological Sincronic Map
AstralExtraMap.description: Allows storing and reloading extra relational maps.

userId.description: User UID who generated this extra mapping

Mission.title: Daily Astros Missions
Mission.description: Tracks daily synchronized interactive challenges completed or ongoing.

TarotReading.title: Tarot Oracle Draws
TarotReading.description: History of tarot cards drawn, questions formulated, and divine recommendations.

question.description: The exact question asked to the cards

drawType.description: Type of tarot layout (e.g. daily, full-3-cards)

drawnCards.description: List of drawn tarot card results

interpretationText.description: Conselheira AI extensive wisdom guide response

NumerologyCycle.title: Comprehensive Numerological Matrix
NumerologyCycle.description: Durable record of personal numerology cycles and daily resonance factors.

derivedCycles.description: String array of current and future energetic cycles

ProsperityMap.title: Empowered Financial Prosperity Map
ProsperityMap.description: Calculated financial directions, color resonance, lunar properties, and actions lists.

Biorhythm.title: Physical and Intuitive Biorhythm State
Biorhythm.description: Saves computed periodic physical, emotional, and intellectual state peaks.

LunarNode.title: Dharma and Karma Lunar Nodes Guidance
LunarNode.description: Maintains Node directions, specific tasks, and karmic warnings.

interpretation.description: Detailed guides for spiritual soul direction

AstroNotification.title: Stellar Alerts and Conjunction Alarms
AstroNotification.description: Log of received astrological weather, transition warnings, and messages.

isRead.description: True if user opened the notification

Subscription.title: Subscription Ledger History
Subscription.description: Auditable log of plan subscriptions, payments verification, and plans metadata.

id.description: Stripe Session ID or transact ID

userId.description: Actively subscribed user email or UID

planId.description: Celestial VIP or Astro Premium key

status.description: Payment checkout status (e.g. active, trial, unpaid)

/users/{userId}.description: User accounts and profile states indexed by uid or unique identifier key.

/device_trials/{deviceId}.description: Global device trial tracking records to enforce single 5-day trial per device.

/users/{userId}/natalCharts/{chartId}.description: Historical subcollection of calculated natal charts. The active chart is pointed to by currentChartId.

/users/{userId}/transits/{transitId}.description: Sub-collection of customized astrological transit cached reports.

/users/{userId}/dailyInsights/{insightId.description: Historical daily insights and dashboard metrics computed for the user.

/users/{userId}/weeklyInsights/{insightI.description: Historical weekly transitional forecasts generated for the home portal.

/users/{userId}/dreams/{dreamId}.description: Sub-collection isolated for user personalized dream log interpretations.

/users/{userId}/extraMaps/{mapId}.description: Sub-collection of customized partner or affinity extra maps sintonized by this user.

/users/{userId}/missions/{missionId}.description: Tracks daily synchronized interactive challenges completed or ongoing.

/users/{userId}/tarotReadings/{readingId.description: History of tarot cards drawn and divine explanations.

/users/{userId}/numerology/{numerologyId.description: Sub-collection of generated numerological matrix and cycles.

/users/{userId}/prosperityMaps/{prosperi.description: Sub-collection of calculated monthly financial directions.

/users/{userId}/biorhythm/{biorhythmId}.description: Periodic biorhythm cycles recorded for permanent user tracking

/users/{userId}/lunarNodes/{nodeId}.description: Lunar nodes of karma and dharma derived charts database

/users/{userId}/subscriptions/{subscript.description: Ledger of plan subscriptions, payments verification, and plans metadata log.
